title: Intensely Salty Canadian Peanut Brittle Bake
description: A keto-friendly Canadian dish featuring peanut brittle, with a salty and flaky texture, and an al-dente finish. This quick-fix recipe is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the crushed peanut brittle, almond flour, and granulated sweetener.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, salt, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
